canonical_items.display_text: Heavily weigh objective professional assessments when they clearly favor one option.
canonical_items.evidence: Among about twenty-five professions, the highest rating by a wide margin was a category called "CPA/Owner".

variants.text: Heavily weigh objective professional assessments when they clearly favor one option.

canonical_items.display_text: List and weigh specific objective and subjective criteria (reputation, size, advancement, people, clients) before deciding.
canonical_items.evidence: I made a list of the criteria that I deemed important.

variants.text: List and weigh specific objective and subjective criteria (reputation, size, advancement, people, clients) before deciding.
Visit employers' offices and meet partners to judge cultural fit and working environment.
Discuss major career choices with your partner and consider lifestyle and location impacts.

canonical_items.display_text: When honoring a mentor, mobilize peers and alumni to fund tangible memorials and scholarships to continue their impact.
canonical_items.evidence: In addition to working together to fund the gravestone, we launched a campaign to establish a scholarship fund in her memory.

variants.text: When honoring a mentor, mobilize peers and alumni to fund tangible memorials and scholarships to continue their impact.

canonical_items.display_text: Create clear ranks, badges, and score-keeping to turn progress into tangible, motivating milestones.
canonical_items.evidence: We were issued individual score sheets that kept track of exercises and projects.

variants.text: Create clear ranks, badges, and score-keeping to turn progress into tangible, motivating milestones.

canonical_items.display_text: When financing major commitments, prioritize saving and accelerated repayment to eliminate debt sooner.
canonical_items.evidence: Daddy immediately began to make double payments each month and ultimately paid off the mortgage in seven years.

variants.text: When financing major commitments, prioritize saving and accelerated repayment to eliminate debt sooner.

canonical_items.display_text: When resources are limited, prioritize financially reasonable compromises so progress can continue.
canonical_items.evidence: She finally compromised on something financially reasonable, surrendering the desired brick exterior, air conditioning, enclosed garage and some other features.

variants.text: When resources are limited, prioritize financially reasonable compromises so progress can continue.

canonical_items.display_text: When presented with a rare opportunity, prioritize firsthand experience even if it requires modest resources or spontaneity.
canonical_items.evidence: Hey, why don’t we go down to Mardi Gras this weekend?

variants.text: When presented with a rare opportunity, prioritize firsthand experience even if it requires modest resources or spontaneity.

canonical_items.display_text: When preparing for an engagement amid limited funds, save earnings specifically to cover the symbolic and practical costs of commitment.
canonical_items.evidence: I saved most of the money earned that summer and began shopping for an engagement ring.

variants.text: When preparing for an engagement amid limited funds, save earnings specifically to cover the symbolic and practical costs of commitment.

canonical_items.display_text: Accept reasonable non-monetary perks when they meet real needs and align with requested contributions.
canonical_items.evidence: He then offered me a seat at the training table in the cafeteria.

variants.text: Accept reasonable non-monetary perks when they meet real needs and align with requested contributions.

canonical_items.display_text: If a candid assessment shows limited near-term prospects, recommend an orderly exit rather than prolonging losses.
canonical_items.evidence: I concluded with a recommendation that we close the office and lay plans to come back in five or ten years

variants.text: If a candid assessment shows limited near-term prospects, recommend an orderly exit rather than prolonging losses.

canonical_items.display_text: Use recovery or downtime to practice and acquire skills that yield long-term benefits.
canonical_items.evidence: While sick and recovering, I read about and ordered a newly published book by Harry Lorayne called How to Develop a Super Power Memory.

variants.text: Use recovery or downtime to practice and acquire skills that yield long-term benefits.

canonical_items.display_text: Prepare your skills and be ready to act when chance presents an opening; serendipity favors the ready.
canonical_items.evidence: serendipity, coupled with a little skill, can dramatically change one’s life.

variants.text: Prepare your skills and be ready to act when chance presents an opening; serendipity favors the ready.

canonical_items.display_text: When a melody moves you, learn and practice it to internalize its emotional effect.
canonical_items.evidence: I learned to play “Somewhere Over the Rainbow” on the piano, and I have played it probably more than a thousand times over the past fifty years.

variants.text: When a melody moves you, learn and practice it to internalize its emotional effect.

canonical_items.display_text: When faced with sudden job loss, remain composed, assess immediate local opportunities, and accept stable roles that preserve continuity.
canonical_items.evidence: he never skipped a beat—not even a day of work —and was employed there for the next ten years.

variants.text: When faced with sudden job loss, remain composed, assess immediate local opportunities, and accept stable roles that preserve continuity.

canonical_items.display_text: When you feel constrained by local expectations, actively pursue concrete opportunities that expose you to new environments.
canonical_items.evidence: I began to plot my exodus.

variants.text: When you feel constrained by local expectations, actively pursue concrete opportunities that expose you to new environments.
When seeking personal growth, deliberately leave familiar surroundings to engage broader environments and communities.

canonical_items.display_text: When an office lacks senior client access, personally pursue introductions through your contacts and community organizations.
canonical_items.evidence: I also called a few key high-pro file business organizations in Baltimore and asked if I could get involved

variants.text: When an office lacks senior client access, personally pursue introductions through your contacts and community organizations.
If formal channels won't produce an introduction, use spouse or informal networks to arrange meetings with senior leaders.

canonical_items.display_text: When raising children, introduce relocations and new environments periodically to build adaptability and independence.
canonical_items.evidence: We believe that both Miranda and Jordan have actually benefitted from moving every three or four years.

variants.text: When raising children, introduce relocations and new environments periodically to build adaptability and independence.
When a trusted spiritual leader engages, allow space for counsel and follow through on commitments.

canonical_items.display_text: When offered an important relocation, involve and consult your spouse by visiting together before committing.
canonical_items.evidence: I said I would like to take my wife and make a visit to Orlando to be sure it was the right thing for us.

variants.text: When offered an important relocation, involve and consult your spouse by visiting together before committing.

canonical_items.display_text: When offered a post-acquisition role that feels misaligned, consult a trusted advisor and prefer taking secured compensation if fit is doubtful.
canonical_items.evidence: I made a call on my good friend Jim Blosser.

variants.text: When offered a post-acquisition role that feels misaligned, consult a trusted advisor and prefer taking secured compensation if fit is doubtful.

canonical_items.display_text: Turn earned savings into long-term secure investments rather than immediate consumption.
canonical_items.evidence: At the end of the summer I went to the post office with some of the money I had saved and bought two $25 Series E U.S. Savings Bonds

variants.text: Turn earned savings into long-term secure investments rather than immediate consumption.
Invest saved resources in tools that support learning and identity (books, music players), rather than immediate consumption.

canonical_items.display_text: Accept lower short-term compensation when long-term advancement and cultural fit indicate better career outcomes.
canonical_items.evidence: we decided to accept the Peat Marwick offer in Jackson, notwithstanding the fact that the salary was the lowest of the competing offers.

variants.text: Accept lower short-term compensation when long-term advancement and cultural fit indicate better career outcomes.

canonical_items.display_text: Do not assume retirement is fixed; adjust involvement level to fit current interests and capacities.
canonical_items.evidence: Retirement is a fuzzy concept for me.

variants.text: Do not assume retirement is fixed; adjust involvement level to fit current interests and capacities.

canonical_items.display_text: Decline prestigious roles that sacrifice the type of work you value after weighing long-term fit and personal priorities.
canonical_items.evidence: I was flattered and honored to be among this elite corps, but basically I didn’t want to do it.

variants.text: Decline prestigious roles that sacrifice the type of work you value after weighing long-term fit and personal priorities.

canonical_items.display_text: Before finalizing an executive contract, prepare and present a detailed term sheet to remove ambiguity.
canonical_items.evidence: I used my Macintosh laptop to prepare a detailed term sheet

variants.text: Before finalizing an executive contract, prepare and present a detailed term sheet to remove ambiguity.

canonical_items.display_text: Accept short-term, fee-based consulting assignments with a clear success metric and act quickly to exploit serendipitous leads.
canonical_items.evidence: We worked out an agreement whereby I would be paid a per diem fee for my services with a success fee of $100,000 if I could sign a buyer within six months.

variants.text: Accept short-term, fee-based consulting assignments with a clear success metric and act quickly to exploit serendipitous leads.

canonical_items.display_text: Serve as an independent sounding board for clients who want objective testing of judgment and be willing to maintain long-term retainer relationships.
canonical_items.evidence: They simply desire an independent sounding board and a resource to test their judgment against.

variants.text: Serve as an independent sounding board for clients who want objective testing of judgment and be willing to maintain long-term retainer relationships.

canonical_items.display_text: Do not ignore small recurring discrepancies; even modest shortages can indicate long-term or systemic abuse.
canonical_items.evidence: I calculated that this shortage amounted to about $9 for every year this lady had worked.

variants.text: Do not ignore small recurring discrepancies; even modest shortages can indicate long-term or systemic abuse.

canonical_items.display_text: When answers to probing questions are weak and intuition signals deception, confront directly and escalate to governance.
canonical_items.evidence: I think you're lying to me.

variants.text: When answers to probing questions are weak and intuition signals deception, confront directly and escalate to governance.
When a client relationship appears at risk, escalate directly to senior client leadership rather than accept lower-level reports.
When competitors are being dismissed internally, meet their leaders to gather facts and reduce bias-driven tactical errors.

canonical_items.display_text: Use allotted practice time to focus on personally motivating material (play by ear) to maintain engagement when technical drills are aversive.
canonical_items.evidence: So, I would spend all the allotted practice time tinkering with familiar melodies and chords.

variants.text: Use allotted practice time to focus on personally motivating material (play by ear) to maintain engagement when technical drills are aversive.

variants.text: Subscribe to a daily 'Word of the Day' service to ensure regular exposure.

canonical_items.display_text: Use competitive word games daily with peers to learn new vocabulary through play.
canonical_items.evidence: I play this competitive game every day

variants.text: Use competitive word games daily with peers to learn new vocabulary through play.

canonical_items.display_text: If an opportunity requires a commitment you are unwilling to sustain, decline it rather than participate half-heartedly.
canonical_items.evidence: I never used the scholarship, because it required playing in the college marching band, which I considered too much work.

variants.text: If an opportunity requires a commitment you are unwilling to sustain, decline it rather than participate half-heartedly.

canonical_items.display_text: When new to a community, directly solicit advice from well-connected locals and offer time or money to demonstrate commitment.
canonical_items.evidence: I picked up the phone and called them both.

variants.text: When new to a community, directly solicit advice from well-connected locals and offer time or money to demonstrate commitment.

canonical_items.display_text: Use examples of others' grit and sacrifice to sustain your own commitment during hardship.
canonical_items.evidence: His grit inspired me.

canonical_items.display_text: Solidify pivotal commitments through public ritual to mark and sustain the decision.
canonical_items.evidence: We were baptized together the following week.

variants.text: Solidify pivotal commitments through public ritual to mark and sustain the decision.
Accept leadership responsibilities when motivated by stewardship and ability to contribute time and resources.

canonical_items.display_text: When company culture expects community involvement, participate to build networks and experience.
canonical_items.evidence: management of the firm expected everyone to be involved in the community in some way.

variants.text: When company culture expects community involvement, participate to build networks and experience.

canonical_items.display_text: Publish a curated selection to public forums to test durability and gather feedback.
canonical_items.evidence: I submitted a portion of my word collection and labeled it "93 Eclectic Words".

variants.text: Publish a curated selection to public forums to test durability and gather feedback.
Before making large discretionary purchases, consult a trusted senior colleague for perspective on affordability.
When evaluating new technology for business or personal use, pilot/test in a controlled way before full-scale adoption.

canonical_items.display_text: Organize occasional full-family gatherings or milestone celebrations to strengthen bonds and create shared memories.
canonical_items.evidence: Occasionally, we are able to assemble everyone at the same time for a family gathering.

canonical_items.display_text: Use humor and parody to test, challenge, and strengthen bonds across ideological differences.

canonical_items.display_text: Prioritize client-critical deadlines and act decisively if the client's survival depends on timely deliverables.
canonical_items.evidence: we were down to the wire with our report —a report where the company’s very survival hung in the balance.

variants.text: Prioritize client-critical deadlines and act decisively if the client's survival depends on timely deliverables.

variants.text: If a client relationship requires trust, accept personal accountability to build deeper, strategic bonds.
Use community service and board participation to create durable professional networks.

Use visible philanthropic or civic actions to create introductions and credibility in a new community.

canonical_items.display_text: When a critical supplier relationship is dysfunctional, insist on a private, neutral-location meeting to negotiate from mutual dependency.
canonical_items.evidence: I insisted that it be a one-on-one meeting and that it be held at a location other than the GM headquarters.

canonical_items.evidence: She believed in memorization, and it was an annual April ritual for the senior English class.

canonical_items.display_text: Accept meaningful responsibility when offered to accelerate practical learning and leadership.
canonical_items.evidence: He was treating me like a partner!

canonical_items.display_text: Treat explicit expressions of mentor confidence as authorization to accept greater responsibility and act without hesitation.

canonical_items.display_text: Use board service to transfer business expertise to nonprofits and treat it as a learning laboratory.

canonical_items.display_text: Avoid unnecessary debt for consumer goods; delay purchase until you can pay cash.

canonical_items.display_text: When an elderly person becomes unable to manage, proactively visit regularly and assume practical responsibilities (dispose property, manage affairs) on their behalf.

canonical_items.evidence: If I’m going to do this, I want to do it on my own.

variants.text: When a child explicitly requests to handle an important opportunity, step back and let them lead the process.

canonical_items.evidence: The firm imposed itself on me with the force of its rich history and professionalism. It molded me into a true professional

variants.text: Use deep institutional knowledge and professional training as a primary resource when leading unfamiliar or struggling organizations.

canonical_items.display_text: When lacking operational experience, hire a knowledgeable professional and undertake formal training before full responsibility.
canonical_items.evidence: I hired a captain to assist me... I supplemented this experience with a course sponsored by the U.S. Power Squadron

variants.text: When lacking operational experience, hire a knowledgeable professional and undertake formal training before full responsibility.

canonical_items.display_text: Persistently press leadership until action is taken when conduct endangers clients or the firm.
canonical_items.evidence: I pressed hard on the matter.

variants.text: Persistently press leadership until action is taken when conduct endangers clients or the firm.

canonical_items.display_text: Document and communicate a clear, evidence-based market assessment to firm leadership to enable constructive decisions.
canonical_items.evidence: I outlined my assessment of the marketplace and feasibility of signi ficant growth and development in the short run.

variants.text: Document and communicate a clear, evidence-based market assessment to firm leadership to enable constructive decisions.

canonical_items.display_text: When written music is overwhelming, learn by listening and rehearse with a knowledgeable mentor to create an audition-quality performance.
canonical_items.evidence: I learned the pieces from listening to him, without any meaningful reference to the sheet music.

variants.text: When written music is overwhelming, learn by listening and rehearse with a knowledgeable mentor to create an audition-quality performance.

canonical_items.display_text: When underprepared, seek quick, focused briefings from knowledgeable peers and rely on attentive listening to synthesize understanding.
canonical_items.evidence: Charlie proceeded to lay out for me the story... The entire conversation lasted no more than a half hour.

variants.text: When underprepared, seek quick, focused briefings from knowledgeable peers and rely on attentive listening to synthesize understanding.

canonical_items.display_text: Build capability by involving learners in real tasks early and assigning responsibility.
canonical_items.evidence: She taught me how to match colors and regularly sent me uptown to the Ben Franklin store with fabric samples to buy matching spools of thread.

variants.text: Build capability by involving learners in real tasks early and assigning responsibility.

canonical_items.display_text: Leverage early accomplishments to create momentum and open further opportunities.
canonical_items.evidence: success bred success.

variants.text: Leverage early accomplishments to create momentum and open further opportunities.

canonical_items.display_text: Stay open to serendipitous opportunities and adapt plans when unexpected events arise.
canonical_items.evidence: They also describe much of the serendipity that has accompanied me along the way.

variants.text: Stay open to serendipitous opportunities and adapt plans when unexpected events arise.

canonical_items.display_text: When you encounter a notable person, consider approaching them directly to have a personal conversation.
canonical_items.evidence: I walked over and struck up a conversation with her.

variants.text: When you encounter a notable person, consider approaching them directly to have a personal conversation.

canonical_items.display_text: Learn about other faiths through direct reading and conversation to increase respect and correct misconceptions.
canonical_items.evidence: I read the entire book, cover to cover

variants.text: Learn about other faiths through direct reading and conversation to increase respect and correct misconceptions.

canonical_items.display_text: When a trusted peer asks you to increase your support, consider promptly raising your pledge.
canonical_items.evidence: So, I doubled our pledge.

variants.text: When a trusted peer asks you to increase your support, consider promptly raising your pledge.

canonical_items.display_text: For politically sensitive, large-scale redesigns, iterate models repeatedly until you reach a defensible, improved allocation and seek unanimous governance approval.
canonical_items.evidence: Following iteration after iteration, and revisions upon revisions, I finally arrived at a process and income allocation that was a dramatic improvement.

variants.text: For politically sensitive, large-scale redesigns, iterate models repeatedly until you reach a defensible, improved allocation and seek unanimous governance approval.
When credibility is contested, stage a high-visibility, strategy-focused event to reset the narrative.

canonical_items.display_text: When promoted to formal authority, speak up about critical issues you previously withheld.
canonical_items.evidence: As a partner myself, however, I felt that I now had the imprimatur to make my views known.

variants.text: When promoted to formal authority, speak up about critical issues you previously withheld.

canonical_items.display_text: When a trusted colleague discloses criminal conduct, advise immediate contact with the appropriate legal authority.
canonical_items.evidence: We agreed that he should personally contact the U.S. Attorney General and describe what he knew. He made the phone call right then and there.

variants.text: When a trusted colleague discloses criminal conduct, advise immediate contact with the appropriate legal authority.

canonical_items.display_text: Use local connectors and barter (e.g., services for introductions) to build initial paid engagements quickly.
canonical_items.evidence: in lieu of fees, he agreed to introduce me around town and recommend me to others.

variants.text: Use local connectors and barter (e.g., services for introductions) to build initial paid engagements quickly.

canonical_items.display_text: Prefer declining engagements you cannot reasonably understand over accepting suspicious-feeling retainers.
canonical_items.evidence: I declined, on the basis that I didn't really understand their business.

variants.text: Prefer declining engagements you cannot reasonably understand over accepting suspicious-feeling retainers.

canonical_items.display_text: When feeling down, recall favorite things to improve mood quickly.
canonical_items.evidence: I simply remember my favorite things, and then I don’t feel so bad.

variants.text: When feeling down, recall favorite things to improve mood quickly.

canonical_items.display_text: When inheriting organizational problems, accept ownership and prioritize fast, decisive action to stabilize the situation.
canonical_items.evidence: the company’s issues were not of my making; they were mine to solve. And I worked with blistering speed and decisiveness to attack them.

variants.text: When inheriting organizational problems, accept ownership and prioritize fast, decisive action to stabilize the situation.

canonical_items.display_text: When numeric or transactional anomalies appear, map the transaction flow end-to-end to reconcile quantities and identify manipulation.
canonical_items.evidence: I flowcharted the number and weight of the cattle, from the buying lot to the kill floor, for a month.

variants.text: When numeric or transactional anomalies appear, map the transaction flow end-to-end to reconcile quantities and identify manipulation.
If physical documents show inconsistencies, obtain bank duplicates or originals to compare endorsements and verify authenticity.

canonical_items.display_text: Rehearse presentations intensively with videotaped critique until delivery is flawless.
canonical_items.evidence: I practiced my entire presentation a dozen or more times, with her videotaping it and following up with harsh criticism and detailed recommendations for improvement.

variants.text: Rehearse presentations intensively with videotaped critique until delivery is flawless.

canonical_items.display_text: If expert local guidance is inconsistent, collect primary data (phone books, maps) and plot target peers to identify desirable neighborhoods.
canonical_items.evidence: I located a Baltimore phone book. I then plotted the home addresses of these executives on a city map.

variants.text: If expert local guidance is inconsistent, collect primary data (phone books, maps) and plot target peers to identify desirable neighborhoods.

canonical_items.display_text: When facing discriminatory policies or rhetoric, voice principled opposition directly and clearly.
canonical_items.evidence: I personally think it's wrong for us to discriminate against anyone.

variants.text: When facing discriminatory policies or rhetoric, voice principled opposition directly and clearly.

canonical_items.display_text: If consensus collaboration with peers is blocked by emotion or loyalty, be prepared to make an independent, defensible decision and act promptly.
canonical_items.evidence: I then decided to abandon my collaboration strategy.

variants.text: If consensus collaboration with peers is blocked by emotion or loyalty, be prepared to make an independent, defensible decision and act promptly.
Prefer bold, rapid interventions over slow incrementalism in turnarounds: act quickly and iterate based on results.
When industry practice is failing you, adopt proven techniques from other sectors and fund them adequately.

canonical_items.display_text: If a compensation or governance decision conflicts with personal principles, vote your stance and be prepared to resign.
canonical_items.evidence: I voted against the compensation and then resigned as a director of both companies.

variants.text: If a compensation or governance decision conflicts with personal principles, vote your stance and be prepared to resign.

canonical_items.display_text: When uncertain about career direction, take aptitude tests and consult mentors before deciding.
canonical_items.evidence: I talked to Mr. Harrison, the school superintendent, about it and he suggested I take an aptitude test.

variants.text: When uncertain about career direction, take aptitude tests and consult mentors before deciding.
If volunteers won't contribute, be prepared to complete critical tasks yourself but recognize and plan to develop delegation skills later.

canonical_items.display_text: When building a career, actively seek mentors and accept their tutelage.
canonical_items.evidence: I have had a lot of help along the way and people have been extremely generous in their tutelage and mentorship.

variants.text: When building a career, actively seek mentors and accept their tutelage.

canonical_items.display_text: When you suspect unfair treatment, gather facts and raise the issue directly with the responsible party.
canonical_items.evidence: I left and walked straight over to Dr. Switzer’s office a few blocks away, and barged in.

variants.text: When you suspect unfair treatment, gather facts and raise the issue directly with the responsible party.

canonical_items.display_text: Persist in requesting management adjustments; if refused, escalate the issue to the board for resolution.
canonical_items.evidence: I worked for days trying to get them to adjust the numbers, but Ray staunchly refused. So, I attended a meeting of Documation’s board of directors and presented our findings.

variants.text: Persist in requesting management adjustments; if refused, escalate the issue to the board for resolution.

canonical_items.display_text: When responding to community disasters, join hands-on local recovery efforts to provide practical help and firsthand perspective.
canonical_items.evidence: Our group rebuilt a fence and a front porch, and collected tons of debris from destroyed neighborhoods.

variants.text: When responding to community disasters, join hands-on local recovery efforts to provide practical help and firsthand perspective.

canonical_items.display_text: When disaster relief needs hands, volunteer on-site even if physically demanding.
canonical_items.evidence: spent a week in the blazing sun helping with the cleanup.

variants.text: When disaster relief needs hands, volunteer on-site even if physically demanding.

canonical_items.display_text: When entering a new geography, verify market demand with research instead of relying on general optimism.
canonical_items.evidence: the firm had done practically no market research on Orlando

variants.text: When entering a new geography, verify market demand with research instead of relying on general optimism.

canonical_items.display_text: When market liquidity disappears, recognize limits of control and stop assuming expansion will continue.
canonical_items.evidence: The capital markets for entrepreneurial businesses completely dried up, quite suddenly, in the year 2000.

variants.text: When market liquidity disappears, recognize limits of control and stop assuming expansion will continue.

canonical_items.display_text: Maintain gratitude and recognize mentorship as part of leadership legacy and relationship-building.
canonical_items.evidence: I am honored and will be forever grateful for the generous experience provided by the firm.

variants.text: Maintain gratitude and recognize mentorship as part of leadership legacy and relationship-building.
